/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/MedialunasPro.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/MedialunasPro.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MedialunasPro.dir/InterfazGrafica.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MedialunasPro.dir/baseDatos/conexion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MedialunasPro.dir/models/cliente.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MedialunasPro.dir/models/insumos.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MedialunasPro.dir/models/pedidos.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MedialunasPro.dir/models/stockVenta.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MedialunasPro.dir/models/variedad.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MedialunasPro.dir/DAO/clienteDAO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MedialunasPro.dir/DAO/insumosDAO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MedialunasPro.dir/DAO/pedidosDAO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MedialunasPro.dir/DAO/stockVentaDAO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MedialunasPro.dir/DAO/variedadDAO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MedialunasPro.dir/DAO_implementacion/clienteDAOImple.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MedialunasPro.dir/DAO_implementacion/insumosDAOImple.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MedialunasPro.dir/DAO_implementacion/pedidosDAOimple.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MedialunasPro.dir/DAO_implementacion/stockVentaDAOimple.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MedialunasPro.dir/DAO_implementacion/variedadDAOimple.cpp.o -o MedialunasPro  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libraylib.so.6.0.0 -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmariadb.so
